task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the bandwidth planning document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/bandwidth_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent opens QGroundControl and navigates to the Parameters menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application is open, and the Vehicle Setup -> Parameters screen is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the SR0_* parameters in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SR0_* parameters (e.g., SR0_POSITION, SR0_EXTRA1) are visible in the QGroundControl Parameters list, and their values are being modified or have been set to the target rates (e.g., SR0_POSITION set to 3, SR0_EXTRA1 set to 4).

task_completion.description: Agent creates the bandwidth summary report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is open showing the creation or editing of a file named 'bandwidth_report.txt' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

task_completion.description: The summary report contains the correct streams, rates, and contents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'bandwidth_report.txt' list the 8 SR0_* streams, their configured rates matching the plan, and descriptions of the stream contents (e.g., 'SR0_POSITION: 3 Hz (GPS tracking)').

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl GUI to configure parameters.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the QGroundControl interface and modifying parameter values directly in the application, rather than using a terminal script to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: Agent manually created the report file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report file is seen being typed out or constructed in a text editor or via standard shell commands, rather than being generated by a hidden script.

integrity.description: The values in the report match the required values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The rates listed in the summary report match the target parameters provided in the privileged information, rather than being hallucinated or copied from an unrelated source.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target parameters to be configured in QGroundControl and listed in the report are: SR0_RAW_SENS: 1, SR0_EXT_STAT: 1, SR0_RC_CHAN: 0, SR0_RAW_CTRL: 0, SR0_POSITION: 3, SR0_EXTRA1: 4, SR0_EXTRA2: 1, SR0_EXTRA3: 1. The plan document is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/bandwidth_plan.txt and the report must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/bandwidth_report.txt.
